ddt:Target.Name: X95_TCU_LC_V2.0
ddt:Target.Description: Base DiagONCAN TCU version 1.00 ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- version 1.0 of TCU LC xml base duplicated from TCU GEN1 version 3.1 version 2.0 removing all data not apllied to TCU LC : one SIM, no MMI input/output version 2.1 : renaming data Service provisionning functions configuration by removing EV; modifying supplier code; adding X95ph2 project version 2.2 : removing DTCs $AE1306, $93D929, $936006;modifying supplier code; separating X95ph2 project from X91ph3 version 2.3: added DID $FE81- DRX Configuration (V2.0)

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level oor/ zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: Last Wake Up Cause.Cause of last Wake Up
PPP Connection Retry
Data.Comment: Number of retries for initial PPP connection

Data.Name: PPP Failure Time out
Data.Comment: Time out for restarting PPP conection tries

Data.Name: PPP Disconnection time out
Data.Comment: Time out for disconnection PPP connection at OFF condition

Data.Name: PPP Rejection retry
Data.Comment: Retry allowed for PPP connection if server authentication rejection
Data.Description:
00 : No retry until next ON cycle
01 : Retry as PPP sequence timeout

Item.Text: No retry until next ON cycle

Data.Name: External GSM Antenna
Data.Comment: TCU connected to External GSM Antenna
Data.Description:
Default: 00

00 : No External GSM antenna connection
01 : External GSM Antenna Connection

Data.Name: ECU Reset Type
Data.Comment: Used to request an ECU reset

List.Item: Response to control status when test in progress
Response to control status when test in progress
Response to control status when test in progress

Data.Name: Service Provisionning Functions configuration.Remote HVAC control.status.activation
Service Provisionning Functions configuration.Plug In missing.status.activation
Service Provisionning Functions configuration.Low battery alert upgrade on remote phone.status.activation
Service Provisionning Functions configuration.LIVE All Tomtom Services.status.activation
Service Provisionning Functions configuration.Internet_widget widget store.status.activation
Service Provisionning Functions configuration.Inhibition Desinhibition of Charge as no pay upgrade.status.activation
Service Provisionning Functions configuration.FLEET Probe service 1.status.activation
Service Provisionning Functions configuration.ECO Scoring Challenge Service.status.activation
Service Provisionning Functions configuration.Create private charge spot off board and download OTA.status.activation
Service Provisionning Functions configuration.Charging Spot Finder upgrade availability and compatibility.status.activation
Service Provisionning Functions configuration.Charging Spot Finder upgrade 3 to 24 spots.status.activation
Service Provisionning Functions configuration.Charging Spot Finder 3 points.status.activation
Service Provisionning Functions configuration.Charging activation or stop by remote.status.activation
Service Provisionning Functions configuration.Charge Spot short term booking.status.activation
Service Provisionning Functions configuration.Battery usage and charge history.status.activation
MFD NFA definition
Data.Description: Configuration of USB connection to NFA or MFD or de-actived;

Data.Name: DRX Configuration.Mode after wake up conditions
DRX Configuration.Hours the TCU will be on DRX mode

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

DataItem.Name: Last Wake Up Cause.Cause of last Wake Up

Request.Name: ExtendedDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request for old ECU

Label.Text: Global Check connection to the GDC
Be carrefull , This routine didn't rise the DTC
Send all the datas to the GDC
